name: Shrimp Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1 Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the shrimp for 3-5 minutes, or until they turn pink and float to the surface. Drain in a colander for 20-30 minutes.
2 Peel the shrimp and remove the vein by slicing along the underside and rinsing under cold water. Refrigerate until ready to serve (several hours or overnight).
3 Place cocktail sauce in the center of a platter. Arrange the shrimp around the bowl of sauce.
